summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADLTrack UI/UX redesign with Airbnb-inspired design. All features working correctly including Landing Page (unchanged), Caregiver Dashboard (offline/online states, vitals, tasks, AI copilot, navigation), Family Dashboard (hero header, vitals scroll, progress card, caregiver card, AI copilot, navigation), and Sign Out flow.
passed_tests: Landing page remains unchanged - ADLTrack branding, 'Simple. Secure.' hero text, green Start Free Trial button present
Caregiver Dashboard: Offline state shows 'You're offline' text and GO button with pulse animation
Caregiver Dashboard: Patient info 'David Smith' displayed correctly
Caregiver Dashboard: Start Shift button (data-testid='start-shift-btn') works and transitions to online state
Caregiver Dashboard: Online state shows 'Shift active' indicator
Caregiver Dashboard: Vitals cards display correct values (BP: 120/76, HR: 72, Temp: 98.6°)
Caregiver Dashboard: Today's Progress section with progress bar present
Caregiver Dashboard: Task cards display with correct priority colors (CRITICAL=rose/red, STANDARD=blue, QUALITY_OF_LIFE=emerald/green)
Caregiver Dashboard: Today's Tasks tab works
Caregiver Dashboard: Requests tab works and shows family requests
Caregiver Dashboard: AI Copilot button (data-testid='copilot-btn') appears and opens modal
Caregiver Dashboard: AI Copilot modal shows 'AI Care Assistant' title and greeting
Caregiver Dashboard: Bottom navigation works (Home, Chat, Shift, Menu)
Family Dashboard: Hero header with patient info 'David Smith is doing well'
Family Dashboard: Vitals horizontal scroll with 4 cards (BP, HR, Temp, Pain Level)
Family Dashboard: Vitals values correct (BP: 120/76, HR: 72)
Family Dashboard: Today's Care Progress card shows '0 of 12 tasks'
Family Dashboard: Active caregiver card shows 'Julia is currently on shift'
Family Dashboard: AI Copilot button (data-testid='family-copilot-btn') works and opens modal
Family Dashboard: Bottom navigation works (Activity, Chat, Alerts, Menu)
Family Dashboard: Menu tab shows profile card and menu items (My Profile, Current Caregiver, Billing, Care History, Settings, Support)
Sign out flow works - clicking Sign Out from Profile page returns to Sign In page with role selection

design_verification.manrope_font: ✓ Manrope font applied to dashboard (font-family: 'Manrope, sans-serif')
design_verification.stone_colors: ✓ 15+ elements using stone color palette (bg-stone-50, bg-stone-100, etc.)
design_verification.rounded_corners: ✓ Soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl) on cards and buttons
design_verification.card_layouts: ✓ 15+ white rounded cards with gentle shadows
design_verification.ai_images: ✓ AI-generated images from emergentagent.com used for patient/caregiver photos

seed_data_creation: None - app uses mocked data from mockData.js

mocked_apis_list: Vitals data mocked (INITIAL_VITALS - BP: 120/76, HR: 72, Temp: 98.6, Pain: 1/10)
Patient profile mocked (PATIENT_PROFILE - David Smith, 78 years old)
AI Copilot uses fallback responses if Gemini API unavailable

context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard components tested at mobile viewport (430x932). Airbnb-inspired redesign verified: Manrope font, stone color palette, rounded corners, card-based layouts with shadows, AI-generated images. Landing page unchanged. Caregiver Dashboard (offline GO button with pulse, online vitals/tasks/progress), Family Dashboard (hero, vitals scroll, progress, caregiver card), and Sign Out flow all working. Priority colors verified: CRITICAL=rose, STANDARD=blue, QUALITY_OF_LIFE=emerald. Use JavaScript clicks for bottom nav buttons to ensure tab switching works.
